en: I swore on the kids. Please, Mike, don't do this to me.
Mike, don't do this to me, please.
Barzini's dead. So is Philip Tattaglia.
Today I settle all family business, so don't tell me you're innocent, Carlo.
ko: 오늘 나는 모든 가족 일을 정리할 거야, 그러니 네가 무죄라고 말하지 마, 카를로.

en: Come on. Don't be afraid, Carlo.
Come on, you think I'd make my sister a widow?
ko: 어서, 내가 내 여동생을 화나게 할 것 같아?
